specializations: FIBERHANCE® BM — biomimetic hair fiber repair and strengthening agent

product_highlights: FIBERHANCE® BM — penetrates hair fiber for superior repair and strengthening
Comprehensive conditioning polymer portfolio for all hair types
Nature-derived and biodegradable innovations for sustainable hair care
UV filter systems protecting hair from photodegradation

notes: Global leader in hair care ingredient innovation with a comprehensive portfolio spanning conditioning polymers, film formers, rheology modifiers, and scalp care actives. Ashland's FIBERHANCE® BM is a breakthrough biomimetic molecule that penetrates the hair fiber to provide superior repair and strengthening. Their nature-derived and biodegradable innovations position them at the forefront of sustainable hair care ingredient development.
